commit.message:
Improve room title restore and user-facing auth/upload errors

- Resolve room name on chat reload by hydrating from room list when store is empty
- Map login/register failures to friendly messages for common auth cases
- Harden upload API error handling for non-JSON failures and 413 payload-too-large
- Surface upload error messages in chat and profile toasts
- Update API client unit expectation for localized auth message

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Fix chat regressions: scroll, online users, DM inbox, refresh route

- Scroll chat to bottom after image load to keep latest message visible
- Track per-room per-user websocket counts to avoid false offline/removal
- Guard room leave on websocket close unless room was actually joined
- Normalize unread DM sender payload fields and filter invalid rows
- Switch routing to HashRouter to prevent 404 on chat page refresh

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Fix 7 reported bugs: private messaging, users list, uploads, auth errors, room password, room deletion

Bug 1: Users Online empty on join - Use serializeEvent() for initial
  history/users events in ChatController instead of manual serialization,
  ensuring proper type discrimination for polymorphic ChatMessage types.

Bug 2: Private messaging broken - Fix ChatService serialization to use
  objectMapper.valueToTree() for PrivateMessage and PrivateHistory events,
  matching the pattern used by other event types.

Bug 3/4: File/image upload + avatar upload - Backend compiles cleanly;
  NoClassDefFoundError was from running old build without clean compile.
  (Resolved by mvn clean compile)

Bug 5: Unfriendly auth error messages - Rework API client error handling
  to always attempt JSON parsing first, extract message/error fields from
  response body, fall back to generic 'Server error (status)' only when
  body is not JSON.

Bug 6: Wrong password allows private room entry - Add joinedRef tracking
  in useWebSocket; errors received before successful join (history/users)
  are treated as connection rejections. ChatPage navigates back to lobby
  on connection error.

Bug 7: Room owner can delete rooms - Add DELETE /api/rooms/{roomId}
  endpoint (owner-only), RoomRepository.delete() with cascade cleanup,
  RoomService.deleteRoom(), frontend API + store + UI with trash icon on
  room cards (visible on hover for room owner).

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Internationalize fallback strings in AppNavigator

- Use t.temples_title instead of hardcoded 'Temple Details'
- Use t.navMandirs instead of hardcoded 'Back' for header back title
- Add useLanguage hook to TemplesStack so it has access to translations

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Fix black screen: add 'active' class to lobby and chat screens

The original CSS uses .screen { display: none } / .screen.active { display: flex }
to toggle screens. Since React conditionally renders pages, the 'active' class
must always be present when a screen component is mounted.

commit.message:
feat: load indicator state from DB in preview for accurate scoring

Add optional preparePreview() hook to StrategyModule. Strategies that
persist indicator state (price histories, stop-losses) can implement it
to hydrate shared state before the preview runs, giving accurate results
without a running scheduler.

Implemented for sma-stoploss. Preview script calls the hook if present.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: use chain_getBlockHash RPC for historical block hash resolution

System.BlockHash storage is limited to the last ~2400 blocks on Bittensor.
Warmup/backfill needs 86k+ blocks of history, so most queries returned
zero hashes silently. The chain_getBlockHash legacy RPC queries the node's
block DB directly and works for any historical block on archive nodes.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Silence harmless polkadot-api RpcError -32601 console noise

polkadot-api's `withArchive` wrapper console.warn's when the archive_v1_*
fallback fails — Bittensor subtensor nodes don't implement these archive
JSON-RPC methods. This happens whenever block processing falls behind and a
block gets unpinned from the chainHead subscription. The errors are purely
informational; the underlying BlockNotPinnedError is handled correctly by
the runner's existing error logic.

Add suppressRpcNoise() to intercept console.warn/error and filter out
RpcError instances with code -32601. Called from both entrypoints
(scheduler.ts and main.ts) before any polkadot-api usage.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Add SSH config generator to user profile page (#3)

* Implement Callis SSH bastion host with web management UI

Complete implementation of the Callis application:
- Hardened OpenSSH sshd container (Alpine, Ed25519 only, AuthorizedKeysCommand)
- FastAPI web app with Jinja2 + htmx UI (Pico CSS, no build step)
- User management with RBAC (admin/operator/readonly)
- SSH public key management with validation (Ed25519, RSA >= 4096)
- Mandatory TOTP 2FA enrollment for all users
- Append-only audit logging of all actions
- Internal key endpoint on port 8081 (Docker-network only)
- Security middleware (CSP, session, TOTP guard, rate limiting)
- Docker Compose orchestration with fail2ban sidecar
- Full README with setup instructions for self-hosters

https://claude.ai/code/session_0184uJ8niU8pCv2WsYwQoR85

* Fix all 18 Copilot review comments: security, correctness, and quality

Security:
- Use HTTPS_ENABLED for secure cookie flag in auth.py and session middleware
- Disable AllowAgentForwarding in sshd_config
- Add permitopen enforcement in internal.py based on user-host assignments
- Add server-side username validation with reserved name checks in users.py
- Validate role parameter with 400 response instead of unhandled ValueError

Correctness:
- Fix naive vs aware datetime comparison in audit.py date filters
- Fix HTMX branch in users.py to return correct template with matching context
- Use urlparse for ssh_host extraction in main.py and hosts.py
- Fix ProxyJump snippets in host_row.html and hosts.html to use parsed ssh_host
- Remove inaccurate last_used_at update from internal.py keys endpoint
- Show audit nav link for all roles (consistent with backend access control)

Performance/Quality:
- Replace N+1 key count queries with single GROUP BY aggregate in users.py
- Precompute dummy bcrypt hash at startup for constant-time login checks
- Remove redundant sed in sshd Dockerfile (overwritten by COPY)
- Guard .pub file chmod in entrypoint.sh, regenerate if missing
- Configure sshd to log to file (-E) so fail2ban can read auth logs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix all 18 new Copilot review comments from second review pass

Security:
- Add 'unsafe-inline' to CSP style-src/script-src for inline styles and onclick handlers
- Add username validation + option injection guard (--) in auth-keys.sh
- Use no-port-forwarding instead of non-standard permitopen="none:0" in internal.py
- Widen decode_jwt exception handling to catch ValueError/TypeError from malformed payloads
- Add hostname/port validation in hosts.py to prevent permitopen injection
- Skip session cookie refresh on logout to prevent re-setting deleted cookie

Build reproducibility:
- Pin uv to 0.6.12 in api/Dockerfile (was :latest)
- Copy uv.lock* for reproducible installs in api/Dockerfile
- Pin fail2ban to 1.1.0 in docker-compose.yml (was :latest)
- Pin caddy to 2.9 in docker-compose.override.yml (was :latest)

Correctness:
- Align ForceCommand to /sbin/nologin (Alpine path) in sshd_config
- Pass app objects directly to uvicorn.Config to avoid double-import
- Remove unused db param and require_totp_complete import from dashboard
- Fix client-side username pattern to match server-side validation
- Update README DEV_MODE description (no longer controls Secure cookies)

Cleanup:
- Remove unused UUID import from users.py
- Remove unused write_audit_log import from audit.py
- Remove unused AsyncSession/selectinload imports from internal.py

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Code cleanup:
- Remove unused RedirectResponse import from dependencies.py
- Remove unused sys, Path, HTMLResponse, get_db, write_audit_log, AuditAction imports from main.py
- Remove unused user_host_assignment import from hosts.py

CSS extraction:

Security:
- Fix TOTP timing oracle: always decrypt+verify even when totp_code is empty
- Remove 'unsafe-inline' from script-src CSP; replace inline onclick handlers
  with external static/app.js using data-dialog-open/data-dialog-close attrs

Architecture:

* Fix all 3 Copilot review comments from seventh review pass

Security:
- Fix RSA key size validation: use int.from_bytes().bit_length() instead of
  len()*8 to accurately measure modulus bit-length (prevents sub-4096 keys
  with leading zero bits from passing validation)
- Fix TOTP verification: normalize code to 6 digits before compare_digest
  (prevents length-mismatch timing leak), and allow ±1 time-step window
  for clock skew tolerance while keeping all comparisons constant-time

Architecture:
- Refactor /dashboard to use Depends(require_totp_complete) and Depends(get_db)
  instead of manual request.state.user checks, aligning with the documented
  route-protection convention in docs/DEVELOPMENT.md

- Reject SSH public keys containing control characters (newlines, tabs, null)
  and reconstruct public_key_text from parsed tokens to prevent authorized_keys
  line injection that could bypass permitopen enforcement
- Fetch keys from API before creating OS user in auth-keys.sh to prevent
  /etc/passwd growth from invalid/unknown usernames; use adduser -H (no home dir)

commit.message:
feat(ui): pre-flight UAT, tamper-evident logs, gVisor RuntimeClass scaffold (closes #10, closes #11, closes #12) (#18)

Issue #10 - pre-flight spend alert verification:
- Pass model/vastai/max_dph as hidden fields in estimate_modal.html so the
  CONFIRM form submits the correct params; execution stays blocked until
  explicit confirmation.
- Add docs/uat/preflight-alert.md with 5 UAT test cases covering modal
  appearance, execution blocking, cost-projection accuracy, energy line
  conditionality, and warning-banner rendering.

Issue #11 - tamper-evident SSE log stream:
- Add _log_session_key (32-byte random, per-process) and _sign_log_event()
  HMAC-SHA256 helper to app/main.py.
- GET /api/log-session-key endpoint exposes the base64 key to the client.
- stream_job_logs now emits JSON {html, sig, seq} instead of plain HTML;
  every event (including error and STREAM ENDED) is signed.
- job_tracker.html fetches the session key via Web Crypto API, verifies each
  SSE event's HMAC-SHA256 signature, and updates the 'Security Integrity ✓' /
  '⚠ Unverified' badge accordingly.

Issue #12 - gVisor/Kata kernel-level isolation scaffold:
- charts/rune-ui/templates/runtime-class.yaml: RuntimeClass (handler: runsc),
  rendered only when runtimeClass.enabled=true.
- charts/rune-ui/values.yaml: runtimeClass.enabled=false, name=gvisor,
  handler=runsc defaults.
- charts/rune-ui/templates/deployment.yaml: injects runtimeClassName into
  pod spec when enabled.
- charts/rune-ui/README.md: documents the feature and usage.
- docs/security/gvisor-isolation.md: full security rationale and setup guide.

Tests: 42 tests, 100% coverage (was 33 tests / 100%).
